Yeah, I don't live that close to the place, but, uh...

Yeah, it'll come back to you guys?

No, because once we get them back, you know...

Ah, you'll stop sending it to me?

Well... you know... the... the best thing... [unclear]
...so if the customer does need it, we would have it.

...and I have a customer sitting there... [laughing] so...
